raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Governor Newsom has proposed a historic investment of $7 billion for broadband infrastructure in California.",
    "The proposal involves leveraging existing Caltrans networks to build open-access broadband infrastructure.",
    "The investment aims to maximize funds and ensure a quick and efficient deployment of high-speed internet infrastructure.",
    "Funds are intended to assist local governments and tribes in building their own broadband infrastructure.",
    "The investment aims to increase access to high-quality broadband service in rural areas.",
    "The pandemic has highlighted that a lack of connectivity prevents access to equitable opportunities such as education and job training.",
    "Senator Lena Gonzalez expressed the importance of major investments for broadband infrastructure to close the digital divide.",
    "The budget proposal highlights the importance of deploying 21st Century broadband infrastructure in California."
  ]
}
```
